description_text:
ResMed AirSense 11 AutoSet CPAP Machine 

The ResMed AirSense 11 AutoSet CPAP Machine is the latest addition to the ResMed AirSense family. This auto-adjusting machine changes airflow pressure levels on a breath-by-breath basis and includes a gender-specific therapy mode, the For Her algorithm, and a set pressure mode. By combining advanced digital health technology with effective therapy modes, the AirSense 11 APAP makes therapy easier and more convenient than ever.

Key Features

AutoRamp with Sleep Onset Detection

This feature starts with low pressure to help patients fall asleep and, once the patient is asleep, gradually increases to the prescribed level.

Expiratory Pressure Relief (EPR)

The ResMed AirSense 11 AutoSet comes with EPR that reduces pressure while breathing out for easy exhalation.

Advanced AutoSet Algorithm

The AirSense 11 uses both AutoSet and AutoSet for Her algorithms to automatically adjust therapy pressure based on changing needs, delivering the ideal lowest pressure for effective therapy.

Advanced Event Detection

It identifies central sleep apnea, respiratory effort-related arousal, and Cheyne-Stokes respiratory events, providing valuable insights for treating physicians.

Touch Screen with Bluetooth Connectivity

The ResMed AirSense 11 AutoSet CPAP Machine features an intuitive touch screen interface combined with Bluetooth connectivity to enhance user experience and therapy management.

AirView Compatibility

With AirView™, you can access therapy data, troubleshoot remotely using the Remote Assist feature, and change device settings from a distance. If patients opt-in, their Care Check-In responses will be available in AirView, providing deeper insights into therapy progress.

What's in the Box?


	Resmed AirSense 11 AutoSet Device
	HumidAir 11 tub
	ClimateLineAir heated tubing/ Slimline tube (Depending on selection)
	Standard filter
	65W AC adaptor
	Travel bag
	User Manual
